CE1.justification: Acted directly with no clarifying questions and no demand for the user to recall or read anything.

CE2.justification: Terse final response: one sentence summarizing what was captured and the implication, plus one sentence on the logged followup — no preamble, no process narration, no closing summary.

CE3.justification: Says where ('in observations.md under a 2026-05-17 dated heading') and why ('week-one... reflects credential/access lag... so week two is the honest baseline') in one clause.

CE4.justification: Discrete file writes for each scaffold artifact; no in-progress markers; a mid-flow interrupt would leave a coherent partial scaffold.
